data.title: Bakudan Ramen | Bold Flavor. Modern Japanese Soul. Texas Spirit.
data.meta_description: Experience authentic Japanese ramen in San Antonio, Texas. House-simmered tonkotsu broth, fresh noodles daily, and bold flavors at three locations. Order online for pickup or delivery.

gbp.error: GBP credentials not configured. Need GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN with Business Profile API enabled.
setup_steps: 1. Enable Business Profile APIs in Google Cloud Console
2. Create OAuth2 credentials with Business Profile scope
4. Link GBP locations to API project
